row2_auxiliary_summary.ego_motion_trend: Forward motion along a multi-lane road with slight rightward drift or lane change indicated by blue trajectory lines.
row2_auxiliary_summary.main_object_trajectory_trend: Red boxes indicate static or slow-moving objects (buildings, parked cars) on the sides; green and red lines suggest dynamic object paths or lane boundaries.

semantic.scene_summary: Urban street scene during daylight with clear visibility. The road has multiple lanes, crosswalks, and intersections. Buildings, trees, parked cars, and moving vehicles are present.
semantic.visibility_notes: All key elements are clearly visible with no significant occlusion or distortion.

logical.motion_and_temporal_consistency: Smooth forward progression of ego vehicle. Objects move naturally relative to camera motion. No sudden jumps or disappearances.
logical.object_continuity: Vehicles and roadside structures remain continuously visible and track consistently across frames.
logical.structure_continuity: Road geometry, building positions, and environmental features maintain spatial coherence over time.

decision.ego_behavior_description: Ego vehicle continues forward steadily, approaching an intersection with crosswalk and traffic signals.
decision.risk_context: No immediate risk detected; scene is orderly with predictable traffic flow.

semantic.scene_summary: AI-generated version of the same urban street scene. Overall layout preserved but with noticeable artifacts and distortions in object shapes and textures.
semantic.visibility_notes: Some objects appear smeared or duplicated; fine details like text on signs or license plates are often lost.

logical.motion_and_temporal_consistency: Forward motion appears generally consistent but with occasional flickering or warping of distant objects. Some vehicles show unnatural size changes or position shifts.
logical.object_continuity: Most objects persist across frames but exhibit instability — e.g., cars may briefly vanish or reappear with altered shape.
logical.structure_continuity: Road structure remains broadly recognizable but suffers from local deformations, especially near intersections and curbs.

decision.ego_behavior_description: Ego vehicle continues forward, though perceived speed or path may be slightly inconsistent due to generation artifacts.
decision.risk_context: Scene readability reduced; potential for misinterpretation of lane boundaries or object positions could affect downstream decision-making.

missing_or_weakened_elements: fine texture detail on vehicles and buildings
newly_introduced_elements: ghosting or duplication of distant structures
warping at road edges and intersections
artifacts_or_instabilities: loss of sharpness in static elements over time
